buildCommand: npm install --include=dev && npm run build:client && npx esbuild api/index.ts --bundle --platform=node --target=node20 --format=cjs --outfile=api/index.js --alias:@shared=./shared --external:mongoose --external:passport --external:passport-google-oauth20 --external:passport-local --external:express --external:express-session --external:connect-mongo --external:bcryptjs --external:zod --external:ws
